message:
feat: add container query infra + convert 5 pilot cards (Phase 2 of #8695) (#8781)

Install @tailwindcss/container-queries plugin and define standard card-width
breakpoint tokens (@xs/<300px, @sm/300px, @md/450px, @lg/600px). Add a
container-type: inline-size wrapper inside CardWrapper so every card's
control bar can respond to its own width instead of the viewport width.

Convert the 5 worst-offending cards to use @container breakpoints:
- ActiveAlerts: control bar + right-side controls
- ClusterMetrics: metric header + controls row
- LLMInference: header controls + filter group
- GPUWorkloads: controls + summary stats grid
- IssueActivityChart: header + summary stats grid

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
